prompt: Editorial magazine cover composition, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). A woman partially veiled behind a translucent tangerine-orange fabric, soft diffused studio lighting, skin tones muted and warm. Background gradient from tangerine #F47A24 at top to coral #E36A4F mid to terracotta #B74635 at bottom, continuous smooth blend. Render TEXT exactly as follows in pure white #FFFFFF, DM Sans typeface: top-left eyebrow in small caps DM Sans Regular 400, tracking +0.1em: 'PROTOCOLO · 01'. Centered title in DM Sans Light 300, letter-spacing -0.02em, line-height 1.0, large display size: 'O Protocolo da Inflamação'. One line below in DM Sans Light 300, smaller: 'Três sintomas. Um marcador. Um número.' Generous negative space. Reserve clean empty area at bottom 80px from edge — DO NOT render any logo or wordmark. ABSOLUTELY NO: medical icons, blood drops, stethoscopes, lab coats, test tubes, heavy drop shadows, neon colors, plastic AI look, white backgrounds, colorful infographics, bar charts, decorative arrows, horizontal divider lines, exclamation marks, emoji. Editorial fashion-magazine aesthetic, Aesop-meets-Equinox restraint.
notes: Cover — no logo per brief, stop-scroll via tangerine contrast + veiled portrait

prompt: Editorial typography slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Solid background gradient tangerine #F47A24 to coral #E36A4F, continuing the cover's gradient progression. ABSOLUTELY NO: medical icons, blood drops, stethoscopes, lab coats, test tubes, drop shadows, neon, plastic AI look, white background, infographics, bar charts, decorative arrows, horizontal divider lines, exclamation marks, emoji, photography. Editorial typography slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Solid background coral #E36A4F shifting toward terracotta #B74635 at the edges, continuing gradient progression from slide 2. Editorial typography slide, 4:5 aspect ratio (1080x1350). Solid background terracotta #B74635 with subtle gradient toward coral #E36A4F at top, continuing gradient. All text pure white #FFFFFF, DM Sans typeface, left-aligned with generous margins. Top: eyebrow DM Sans Regular 400, small caps, tracking +0.1em: 'A FAIXA QUE IMPORTA'. Generous space.
